name: Yousuf Agha
verdict: Ships LLM products end to end: from the OpenAI API and Python through to client-facing delivery.

points: Built analytics dashboards and performance-tracking pipelines guiding data-driven content and client-targeting decisions

experience.place: Dubai, UAE (on-site, then remote from Melbourne)
points: Built and shipped AI proofs-of-concept for clients in education and insurance, from business goals to working prototypes

Aligned AI prototypes with user experience and feasibility across engineering and business teams
Coordinated collection of 3,000+ academic content items with structured handoff for quality assurance and publication
Cleaned and validated data across multiple tools, resolving 40+ duplication and formatting issues
